title: Professional Journey
paragraphs: I am a developer at inquirED, a leader in inquiry-based learning. I create digital solutions that deliver inquirED's curriculum to educators and students across the United States.

In my previous role as a product owner, I managed enterprise software projects across multiple industries. I have a deep understanding of the product development lifecycle, and I am skilled at working with cross-functional teams to deliver successful products. I am also an expert in user experience design and usability testing.

I am a highly motivated and results-oriented individual with a strong work ethic. I am also a team player and I am always willing seek out better solutions and processes for how the work is done. I am confident that I have the skills and experience to be a valuable asset to any team.
